title: agastache pallidiflora subsp. pallidiflora
intro: Agastache pallidiflora subsp. pallidiflora, also known as Mexican giant hyssop, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The medicinal properties of Agastache pallidiflora subsp. pallidiflora include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce fever. Agastache pallidiflora subsp. pallidiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
